name: Sokoman Minerals Corp.
description: Pirate Gold Corp., formerly known as Sokoman Minerals Corp., is a Canadian-based mineral exploration company focused on unlocking high-grade gold potential within its district-scale Treasure Island Project in Newfoundland. The company controls a dominant land position along the prospective Valentine Lake Fault, adjacent to major gold deposits. Led by a proven management team with a history of significant discoveries in the region, Pirate Gold utilizes advanced geological exploration to target bonanza-grade gold mineralization, positioning itself as a key player in Newfoundland's emerging world-class gold district.
